rawContent: {"stage":"build","insights":[{"kind":"convention","text":"Verification-only tasks are classified as 'chore' with risk 'low' and require no file modifications.","scope":"task.md classification"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Multi-step pipeline tests that depend on a prior stage completing can be chained via a nohup monitor — no manual intervention needed after step 1 fires.","scope":"agent.md / test-suite"},{"kind":"decision","text":"The --from flag was pre-implemented; this stage only confirmed it in production by observing 'Resuming from: build' in logs.","scope":"kody pipeline"}]}
